goal: affine_zero_vadd_constraint[V, P](a.vadd) = forall(x0: P) { a.vadd(V.0, x0) = x0 }

p.c: function[T0, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: (T1, T0) -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(T1.0, x1) = x1 } = affine_zero_vadd_constraint[T1, T0](x0) }[P, V](a.vadd)

(forall(x0: P) { a.vadd(V.0, x0) = x0 })

goal: affine_add_vadd_constraint[V, P](a.vadd) = forall(x0: V, x1: V, x2: P) { a.vadd(x0 + x1, x2) = a.vadd(x0, a.vadd(x1, x2)) }

p.c: function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0(x1, x0(x2, x3)) = x0(x1 + x2, x3) } = affine_add_vadd_constraint[T0, T1](x0) }[V, P](a.vadd)

(forall(x0: V) { not affine_add_vadd_constraint[V, P](a.vadd) or forall(x1: V, x2: P) { a.vadd(x0, a.vadd(x1, x2)) = a.vadd(x0 + x1, x2) } = true })
